text.title: Shutdown Customer Email Pack Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the shutdown decision firm AND ≥30 days remain before service-off?

branch.question: Are refund_or_migration terms decided AND is a named human signing?

branch.conclusion: Skip this methodology. Decide refund vs migrate + name signer before drafting.
Skip this methodology. Defer until decision is firm AND ≥30-day window exists.

text.example: decision=firm service_off=2026-07-01 announce_planned=2026-05-30 → 30d window OK; refund=monthly_remainder/12; signer=founder → run 3-email cadence per r3.
